parsed.production_notes: The video exhibits clear signs of AI generation. The characters' faces have an uncanny smoothness, the physics of the skydive are unnatural with static floating, and the parachute rigging makes no physical sense.

characters.appearance: Elderly Indian woman in her 70s, medium build, medium complexion. She has a cheerful and confident facial expression.
characters.wardrobe: Bright red and orange traditional Rajasthani outfit, colorful turban, gold jewelry, and clear safety goggles.

characters.appearance: Younger female in her 30s, medium build, light complexion. She has a supportive and smiling facial expression.
characters.wardrobe: Colorful patterned jumpsuit and a black helmet with a clear visor.

scenes.setting: Open door of a small airplane, high altitude, bright sunny day.

panels.panel_visual_description: An elderly Indian woman and a younger female skydiving instructor sit at the open door of a small airplane, preparing to jump. The elderly woman is positioned in front, wearing a vibrant red and orange traditional outfit, a colorful turban, gold jewelry, and clear safety goggles. The instructor sits closely behind her, wearing a patterned jumpsuit and a black helmet with a clear visor. Both women are smiling enthusiastically and giving thumbs-up gestures to the camera. The background reveals a vast, arid desert landscape viewed from a high altitude. The lighting is bright and sunny, casting clear shadows within the aircraft cabin.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows an elderly woman and her instructor sitting at the edge of an open airplane door, ready to skydive. They are both smiling and giving thumbs up. The background is a desert landscape.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: डर तो नहीं लग रहा दादी? [Are you not scared, grandma?]
Character A says: नो बेटा, वन लाइफ, नो रिप्लेस, एंड आई एम स्क्वीज़िंग एवरी ड्रॉप आउट ऑफ़ दिस राइड। लेट्स गो। [No child, one life, no replays, and I am squeezing every drop out of this ride. Let's go.]

scenes.setting: Mid-air, skydiving over a desert landscape with a fort, bright sunny day.

panels.panel_visual_description: The elderly woman and the instructor are in freefall, skydiving together mid-air. The elderly woman is securely strapped to the front of the instructor. Both characters are smiling broadly with their arms outstretched in a flying pose. The elderly woman is dressed in her traditional red and orange outfit, turban, and goggles, while the instructor wears her patterned jumpsuit and helmet. Above them, the red and white canopy of a parachute is partially visible. The background features a clear blue sky and a sprawling desert landscape with a large, ancient fort below. The lighting is bright and natural, illuminating the characters evenly.

scenes.visual_description: The scene depicts the two women skydiving in mid-air. They are strapped together, smiling, with their arms out. A parachute is visible above them, and a desert landscape with a fort is below.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: दादी, आप इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश में बात कर रही हो? [Grandma, you are speaking in such good English?]
Character A says: अरे बेटी, बूढ़ी हूँ तो क्या हुआ? दिमाग तो अभी भी चलता है। [Oh daughter, so what if I am old? My brain still works.]
Character B says: दादी मुझे बताइए, ये इंग्लिश आपने सीखी कहाँ से इस उम्र में? [Grandma tell me, where did you learn this English at this age?]
Character A says: बेटी, मेरा पोता दो साल पहले दिल्ली गया पढ़ाई के लिए। वहाँ उसने इंग्लिश मीडियम स्कूल ले लिया। अब जब फोन आता है तो पोता इंग्लिश में बात करता है, मुझे समझ नहीं आता था। एक दिन मेरे पोते ने बोला... [Daughter, my grandson went to Delhi two years ago for studies. There he took admission in an English medium school. Now when he calls, my grandson speaks in English, I couldn't understand. One day my grandson said...]
Character A says: दादी, इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप है, ट्राई करो। मैंने बोला बेटा इस उम्र में इंग्लिश? पोता बोला दादी उम्र से क्या होता है, रोज़ पंद्रह मिनट दो। [Grandma, there is an English Seekho app, try it. I said son, English at this age? Grandson said grandma what does age matter, give 15 minutes daily.]
Character B says: और आपने ट्राई किया? [And did you try?]
Character A says: हाँ बेटी, एक रुपये का ट्रायल था। सोचा एक रुपये में क्या जाएगा, डाउनलोड किया। एक्सपर्ट्स हैं उसमें, छोटे वीडियोस में हिंदी में समझाते हैं। स्पोकन इंग्लिश शो है, बिल्कुल बेसिक से। मैं रात को सोने से पहले एक-दो वीडियो देखती थी। [Yes daughter, there was a one rupee trial. Thought what will go in one rupee, downloaded it. There are experts in it, they explain in Hindi in short videos. There is a spoken English show, from the absolute basics. I used to watch one or two videos before sleeping at night.]
Character A says: और बेटी, एक एआई कोच है उसमें, उससे मैं चैट करती थी। पहले तो टाइप करना भी नहीं आता था ढंग से, धीरे-धीरे सीखा। एआई कोच से बोली, हाउ टू टॉक टू माय पोता? उसने सिखा दिया, हाउ आर यू डिअर? डिड यू ईट? टेक केयर ऑफ़ योरसेल्फ। [And daughter, there is an AI coach in it, I used to chat with it. At first I didn't even know how to type properly, slowly I learned. I asked the AI coach, how to talk to my grandson? It taught me, how are you dear? Did you eat? Take care of yourself.]
Character A says: मैंने प्रैक्टिस की, गलत बोलती थी, सुधार देता था। बार-बार गलत बोलती थी, फिर से सुधार देता था। कभी नहीं बोला, दादी आप छोड़ो, आपकी उम्र नहीं है। एआई कोच से कोई शर्म नहीं है बात करने में। रात के दस बजे सब सो जाते हैं, मैं एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करती थी। [I practiced, I used to speak wrong, it would correct me. I used to speak wrong again and again, it would correct me again. It never said, grandma you leave it, it's not your age. There is no shame in talking to the AI coach. At 10 PM everyone goes to sleep, I used to practice with the AI coach.]
Character B says: अब क्या फर्क पड़ा? [What difference did it make now?]
Character A says: अब पोता फोन करता है तो मैं खुद बात करती हूँ। डॉक्टर के प्रिस्क्रिप्शन समझ आ जाते हैं। किसी पे डिपेंड नहीं करती मैं। पोता कहता है... [Now when my grandson calls, I talk myself. I can understand doctor's prescriptions. I don't depend on anyone. Grandson says...]
Character A says: दादी, आप तो मुझसे अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलती हो। [Grandma, you speak better English than me.]
Character A says: मैं कहती हूँ बेटा, मेरे पास इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप है। तो बेटी, अगर ये सत्तर साल की दादी सीख सकती हैं, तो तुम तो बच्चे हो। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो, एक्सपर्ट के वीडियो देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो। उम्र से कुछ नहीं होता है, हिम्मत से होता है। [I say son, I have the English Seekho app. So daughter, if this 70-year-old grandma can learn, then you are just kids. Download the English Seekho app, watch expert videos, practice with the AI coach. Age doesn't matter, courage does.]

scenes.setting: Digital graphic, solid light purple background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically against a solid light purple background. The composition is simple and centered, focusing entirely on the device. The lighting is flat and even, typical of a digital graphic.

scenes.visual_description: An end card showing a smartphone with the English Seekho app icon on the screen. Below the phone is an 'INSTALL NOW' button. The background is a solid light purple.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इनस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid black screen is shown. The composition is entirely static and minimal. There are no characters, props, or settings visible. The lighting is completely dark.

scenes.visual_description: A black screen displaying a lengthy disclaimer text in white.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Disclaimer
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority, institution, brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names, trademarks, logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai. Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai. English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta. Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
